data.title: Polymarket Introduces Steam Account Login Option
data.description: Polymarket has announced a new feature allowing users to log in using their Steam accounts. According to Odaily, this addition aims to enhance user accessibility and convenience on the platform.

data.title: HypeStrat Increases HYPE Holdings by 186,877 Tokens
data.description: HypeStrat, a treasury company under HYPE, has recently increased its holdings by 186,877 HYPE tokens, valued at $7.6 million. According to BlockBeats, this acquisition took place over the past four days. Currently, HypeStrat holds a total of 19.15 million HYPE tokens, with an estimated value of $780 million, alongside $112 million in cash.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Metaplanet Raises $50 Million in Zero-Interest Bonds to Buy More Bitcoin
data.description:
Key Takeaways
Tokyo-listed Metaplanet has issued 8 billion yen ($50 million) in zero-coupon bonds to EVO FUND, with proceeds earmarked for Bitcoin purchasesThe 20th series of ordinary bonds matures in April 2027, is unsecured, and carries no interest cost for MetaplanetMetaplanet now holds approximately 40,177 BTC after adding 5,075 BTC in Q1 2026, making it the third-largest publicly listed Bitcoin holder globallyThe raise extends Metaplanet's capital markets-driven accumulation strategy, drawing frequent comparisons to Strategy's balance sheet approach in the USMetaplanet shares were down approximately 3.69% at time of filing
Tokyo-listed Metaplanet has raised 8 billion Japanese yen, equivalent to approximately $50 million, through a new issuance of zero-coupon bonds to EVO FUND, with the proceeds designated for additional Bitcoin purchases, according to a company filing dated April 24.
The bonds, designated as Metaplanet's 20th series of ordinary bonds, mature in April 2027 and are unsecured, providing the company with another tranche of zero-interest financing as it continues to scale one of the largest corporate Bitcoin treasuries in the market.
Deal Structure
EVO FUND, a Cayman Islands-based fund within the Evolution Financial Group specializing in structured financings for digital asset-focused companies, is the sole subscriber and has been the primary funding partner for Metaplanet's previous zero-coupon bond issuances.
Under the terms of the transaction, the bonds will be redeemed at par on maturity. EVO FUND retains the right to request early redemption with five business days' notice, while Metaplanet may also redeem part or all of the bonds early if it completes future financings with the same investor.
Metaplanet said the bond sale is expected to have only a minimal impact on its consolidated results for fiscal 2026, and committed to providing an update if any material impact on financial performance arises.
Bitcoin Holdings Now Third-Largest Among Public Companies
The latest raise follows an aggressive first quarter in which Metaplanet added 5,075 BTC, lifting total holdings to approximately 40,177 BTC and cementing its position as the third-largest publicly listed Bitcoin holder globally. The company has consistently used debt and equity financing to accumulate Bitcoin as a treasury asset rather than relying on operating cash flow -- a strategy that draws direct comparisons to Strategy's balance sheet approach in the United States.
The new issuance signals Metaplanet's intention to continue accumulating despite a volatile stretch for crypto markets, with Bitcoin trading around $78,900 in recent sessions after briefly touching $79,000.

data.title: Swiss Central Bank Governor: No Plans to Adjust Gold Holdings
data.description: The Swiss Central Bank Governor has stated that there are no current plans to increase or decrease the bank's gold holdings. According to Jin10, this announcement comes amidst ongoing discussions about the role of gold in national reserves. The governor emphasized that the bank's strategy regarding gold remains unchanged, reflecting a stable approach to managing its assets.

data.title: Russia's Central Bank Lowers Key Interest Rate to 14.5%
data.description: On April 24, Russia's central bank announced a reduction in its benchmark interest rate by 50 basis points, bringing it down to 14.5%. According to Jin10, this move aligns with market expectations.

data.title: Russia's Central Bank Projects Inflation Rate to Decline by 2026
data.description: Russia's Central Bank has projected that under the current monetary policy stance, the annual inflation rate will decrease to between 4.5% and 5.5% by 2026. According to Jin10, the bank anticipates that from 2027 onwards, the annual inflation will remain at the target level.

data.title: Russia's Central Bank to Assess Rate Cut Necessity Amid Inflation Trends
data.description: Russia's Central Bank announced plans to evaluate the necessity of further interest rate cuts at its upcoming meeting. According to Jin10, the decision will be based on the sustainability of the inflation slowdown, the dynamics of inflation expectations, and an analysis of external and domestic risks.

data.title: AIW3 Secures $2 Million in Seed Funding for Web3 AI Infrastructure
data.description:
AIW3, a Web3 AI infrastructure company, has announced the completion of a $2 million seed funding round. According to ChainCatcher, the round was led by Buffalo Capital, with participation from GalaXin Capital and Three-stones Ventures.

AIW3 is focused on transitioning to an Agent-as-a-Service (AaaS) on-chain execution paradigm. The company aims to provide callable strategy services, autonomous agent orchestration, and native vault collaborative fund flows, with the goal of building a system-level next-generation on-chain execution layer. The company has stated that its core protocol infrastructure has now entered a fully verifiable real-time operational phase, laying the foundation for the scalable development of a decentralized agent network and ecosystem.

data.title: Ryanair to Relocate Berlin Base Due to Rising Fees
data.description: Ryanair has announced plans to abandon its airport base in Berlin, where it currently operates seven aircraft. Bloomberg posted on X that the airline will shift its capacity to more cost-effective locations, including Sweden and Albania, citing increased fees in the German capital as the primary reason for the move. This decision reflects Ryanair's ongoing strategy to optimize operations by focusing on lower-cost airports, aiming to maintain competitive pricing and efficiency in its services.

data.title: STOCKS | AMD Shares Surge 10% in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: AMD's stock price has seen a significant increase, expanding its pre-market gains to 10%. According to Jin10, this surge reflects positive investor sentiment and market response to recent developments surrounding the company.

data.title: Saturn Increases Investment in $STRC Shares
data.description: Saturn has announced an additional purchase of $STRC shares valued at $18 million this week. According to Odaily, this brings Saturn's total holdings to $33 million. Saturn is supported by Strategy's Stretch STRC and is an issuer of on-chain yield stablecoins.

data.title: Tron Inc. Increases TRX Holdings with Recent Purchase
data.description: Tron Inc. has acquired 152,162 TRX tokens on Friday at an average price of $0.3286, bringing its total corporate holdings to over 693 million tokens. According to NS3.AI, this move is part of Tron Inc.'s strategy to expand its digital asset treasury. Justin Sun, the founder of Tron, encouraged followers to continue purchasing TRX. The transactions are recorded in a public wallet on the Tron blockchain, allowing investors to monitor the accumulation in real time.

data.title: Saturn increased its stake in STRC, bringing its total holdings to $33 million.
data.description: Saturn announced this week that it has purchased an additional $18 million worth of $STRC shares, bringing its total holdings to $33 million. Saturn is reportedly an on-chain yield stablecoin issuer powered by Strategy's Stretch STRC. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Experts Weigh In on Bitcoin's Recovery and Altcoin Weakness
data.description: Bitcoin has maintained its position above $78,000, leading some experts to suggest that the cryptocurrency winter may be over. According to NS3.AI, Michael Saylor expressed optimism about Bitcoin's recovery, indicating that the prolonged downturn might have ended. However, Jason Fernandes noted that despite Bitcoin's improvement, altcoins continue to show signs of weakness. Mati Greenspan added that the recent movements since the October 10 flash crash appear to be a pullback within a larger bull market trend.

data.title: Ethereum's Triangle Pattern Nearing Resolution, Says Trader Merljin
data.description: Ethereum's long-standing triangle pattern is approaching a critical juncture, according to trader Merljin. A breakout above $4,350 could set the stage for a measured target of $10,000. According to NS3.AI, Merljin also noted that a decline below $1,950 would disrupt the structure that has been in place since 2017.

data.title: Samsung Electronics Faces Potential Strike Over Bonus Dispute
data.description: Samsung Electronics' semiconductor production dropped by over 18% in a single day during a general assembly held by its union on April 23, according to the union's "Joint Struggle Headquarters." The union disclosed the production decline data and pressured management, warning that if the company does not agree to allocate 15% of operating profits as performance bonuses, a significant 18-day strike next month could severely impact production. According to Jin10, the union stated on April 24 that due to the previous day's assembly, which involved around 40,000 members, the night shift production at memory chip factories fell by 18.4%. The decline was even more pronounced at wafer foundries, with a 58.1% drop. The union had previously estimated that production losses during the general strike could exceed 30 trillion won. Samsung Electronics' operating profit for this year is expected to be around 300 trillion won. The union's demand would require approximately 45 trillion won in performance bonuses. If management does not meet these demands, the union plans to initiate an 18-day strike from May 21 to June 7. Additionally, the union intends to mobilize "safety protection facility" operators responsible for preventing chemical leaks to maximize the impact on production.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with ABTC up 2.38%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with COIN up 0.31%, MSTR up 1.16%, ABTC up 2.38%, HOOD up 1.24%, SBET up 27%, MARA up 0.17%, and CRCL up 0.95%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Bitcoin Financing Engine Faces Challenges as Strategy STRC Falls Below $100
data.description: Strategy STRC preferred stock has dropped below its $100 face value, according to PANews. This development has impacted the Bitcoin financing engine, causing disruptions in Michael Saylor's plans to purchase more Bitcoin. The market's marginal buying interest is also showing signs of instability.

data.title: Wall Street's Shift Driven by Opportunity Costs
data.description: Wall Street's recent changes are not driven by belief but by the opportunity costs of missing out on potential gains. According to PANews, the financial sector is adapting to new trends and opportunities to avoid losing potential profits. This shift highlights the pragmatic approach of financial institutions in response to evolving market dynamics.

data.title: SpaceX Nears Record IPO, Outpaces Competitors
data.description: SpaceX is approaching a record initial public offering (IPO), further solidifying its lead over competitors. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's advancements under the leadership of Elon Musk. The aerospace manufacturer and space transportation company has been making significant strides in the industry, setting new benchmarks for innovation and growth. As SpaceX continues to expand its operations and capabilities, it remains a dominant force in the space sector, outpacing its rivals in both technological advancements and market presence.
